---
title: "Chapter 5: Numerical Solution of Algebraic Systems"
---

## Overview

This chapter covers methods for solving systems of linear and nonlinear algebraic equations arising from discretized PDEs.

## Learning Objectives

- Implement direct solution methods
- Apply iterative solution techniques
- Understand preconditioning strategies
- Solve nonlinear systems

## Topics

### 5.1 Direct Methods (Gaussian Elimination, LU Decomposition)

### 5.2 Iterative Methods (Jacobi, Gauss-Seidel, SOR)

### 5.3 Krylov Subspace Methods

### 5.4 Preconditioning Techniques

### 5.5 Nonlinear Systems (Newton-Raphson)
